programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: En Kansas ha habido una serie de tornados donde han sido encontrados cuerpos de adolescentes desmembrados. La UAC es llamada para investigar. Mientras, JJ está preocupada, ya que su hijo Henry había estado enfermo y quería estar con él

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble identidad
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de un marine y descubre más cosas sobre su vida de las que nadie habría imaginado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Jurisdicción
programme.desc: El equipo descubre sorprendentes similitudes entre ellos y sus homólogos del CGIS cuando aparece muerto un buzo de la Marina que buscaba un tesoro hundido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Error de identidad
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan un atentado local, pero enfrentan tensión y resistencia de la comunidad. Mientras, Frank debe lidiar con las consecuencias políticas cuando un hombre golpea a un oficial que fue demasiado agresivo en su interrogatorio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Lazos que unen
programme.desc: La lealtad de Danny se pone a prueba en el caso de un amigo de la infancia vinculado a la mafia. Frank se entera de que el crimen aumenta por una decisión judicial.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Espectro
programme.desc: Danny busca al distribuidor de una nueva y letal marca de heroína. Frank hace todo lo posible para ayudar a sacar las drogas de las calles.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Asuntos pendientes
programme.desc: Danny y Maria buscan a un veterano con posible estrés postraumático. Frank es sorprendido en una conferencia de prensa por una mujer que busca justicia para su hija asesinada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: En Kansas ha habido una serie de tornados donde han sido encontrados cuerpos de adolescentes desmembrados. La UAC es llamada para investigar. Mientras, JJ está preocupada, ya que su hijo Henry había estado enfermo y quería estar con él

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un caso se vuelve personal para García cuando la UAC investiga la desaparición de una mujer, en su grupo de apoyo a sobrevivientes, cuya hija desapareció hace siete años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest tells Officers he has a gun in his waist pack. Deputies chase a man on a bike into a backyard. A man tosses car keys on the roof to keep his girlfriend from leaving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect wanted for brandishing a knife squares up with Officers. A passenger learns the hard way that a friend offered him a ride in a stolen Jeep. A young driver is caught with magic mushrooms.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver believes Officers 'cheated' by using Stop Sticks to end a pursuit. A man making threats at a gas station is caught with his pants down. A suspect caught with meth claims he is a video judge.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a man suspected of robbery. A riot erupts at a juvenile party on the beach. Officers find an intoxicated man stuck on an iron fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman claims a man abused her then put a curse on her. Police arrest a man for having illegal drugs on him. An elderly woman locks herself in the restroom at a bank.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer goes undercover as a prostitute. A woman finds a snake in her home. A man solicits himself to an undercover officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects lead Officers on a high speed pursuit. An Officer discovers two men have warrants after a traffic stop. A man hides from the police after a domesitc disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer attempts to pull over a car which leads to a high speed pursuit. An Officer encounters an apartment fire. A man is hit by a vehicle in a trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man's pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous pursuit between Officers and a known meth dealer ends in an arrest. A suspect with several felony warrants is apprehended without incident. A pursuit involving a stolen motorcycle exceeds speeds of 100mph.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A K-9 unit assists on a motorcycle pursuit turned foot chase gone awry. Officers investigate after noticing the garage door to an auto body shop is open. A pursuit involving a stolen vehicle driving on the wrong side of the freeway ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a hijacked medevac helicopter with CSI Brody aboard goes missing, the entire team is on hunt.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a Jane Doe is found near the freakish attractions of a 19th-century-inspired traveling sideshow, the team investigates a cast of unusual characters.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team arrives at a car crash, they find three casualties and a human brain that doesn't belong to any of the victims.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates three seemingly unrelated murders, they discover someone is getting revenge for cold case murders that were never solved.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team discovers a deceased rancher was also a ballistics expert, they have to work with the FBI to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the body of a naked dead man is discovered by Dr. Robbins' wife in their master bedroom, it leads to a lot of questions for the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Willows works with the FBI again after a professional hit occurs at a law firm she's recommended to her friend.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team says goodbye to Catherine Willows as she makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead and her hair is done up '70s style complete with vintage clothes, the CSI team discovers clues that point to a killer with a hair fetish.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell asks for advice from a former colleague on a case involving the death of a man's ex-girlfriend. Elisabeth Shue Joins The Cast As New CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a house is stolen completely off its foundation, the CSIs are on the case in search of answers. Meanwhile, new CSI Julie Finlay showcases her skill in blood analysis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a blackout cripples the city, the CSIs must revert to old-school methods to solve the case of a missing child.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are brought in to solve the case of a recently murdered student whose death photo ends up trending on the Internet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team is called in to investigate a robbery-homicide at an "Alice In Wonderland"-themed wedding, they have little to work with to find a killer. (Jaclyn Smith guest stars)

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un helicóptero de evacuación médica secuestrado con el CSI Brody a bordo desaparece, todo el equipo está en la caza.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una desconocida cerca de las extrañas atracciones de un espectáculo itinerante inspirado en el siglo XIX, el equipo investiga un elenco de personajes inusuales.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI llega a un accidente automovilístico, encuentran tres víctimas y un cerebro humano que no pertenece a ninguna de las víctimas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga tres asesinatos aparentemente no relacionados, descubren que alguien se está vengando por asesinatos de casos sin resolver que nunca se resolvieron.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI descubre que un traficante fallecido también era un experto en balística, tienen que trabajar con el FBI para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa del Dr. Robbins descubre el cuerpo de un hombre muerto desnudo en su dormitorio principal, el equipo de CSI se hace muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Willows vuelve a trabajar con el FBI después de que ocurre un golpe profesional en un bufete de abogados que ella recomendó a su amiga.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se despide de Catherine Willows mientras toma una decisión que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer es encontrada muerta y su cabello arreglado al estilo de los años 70 y ropa vintage, el equipo de CSI descubre pistas que apuntan a un asesino con un fetiche por el cabello.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell pide consejo a una antigua colega sobre un caso relacionado con la muerte de la exnovia de un hombre. Elisabeth Shue se une al elenco como la nueva CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una casa es totalmente robada de sus cimientos, el equipo de CSI busca respuestas. Mientras tanto, la nueva CSI Julie Finlay muestra su habilidad en el análisis de sangre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un apagón paraliza la ciudad, el equipo de CSI debe volver a los métodos de la vieja escuela para resolver el caso de un niño desaparecido.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para resolver el caso de un estudiante asesinado recientemente de quien la foto de su muerte termina siendo tendencia en internet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar un robo y homicidio en una boda con el tema de “Alicia en el país de las maravillas”, no tienen mucho con qué trabajar para hallar al asesino. (Estrella invitada Jaclyn Smith)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Det. Frank Tripp's life hangs in the balance when he steps on a land mine while investigating a crime scene. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a truck full of confiscated weapons is hijacked and the weapons are released back into the public, Horatio links the crime to Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A member of the team is pronounced dead after being shot in the head. Not wanting to give up, Horatio has the CSI rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must investigate when the parents of a baby sitter in an upscale neighborhood are brutally murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hunting weekend turns deadly when someone in the group is mauled by a bear and evidence suggests foul play. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate developer is killed, Horatio and the CSI team suspect his wife and her two secret twin sisters.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio suspects that the County Supervisor and the owners of a nearby Native American Casino may be involved when a murder victim is found scalped.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate a movie star's death while he was in a celebrity rehab center and on the verge of exposing some damaging secrets.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A nasty divorce gets even worse when the husband's mistress turns up dead and, as the body count increases, Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio investigates a case of revenge on a scorned ex-lover. A CSI's personal problems taint the investigation and Horatio is forced to fire them.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a suspected carjacker is murdered, the CSIs learn that the victim may have been involved in drug smuggling off the shores of Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A serial killer suspected of killing young women and branding them with a 'Y' is caught and also identified as having the extra Y chromosome.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a probation officer, and Horatio learns that one of the suspects in the murder may be a son he didn’t know he had.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the apparent murder of a college girl, while Delko has mysterious sightings of the late Tim Speedle.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un presidiario fugitivo toma a Natalia como rehén y le cuenta un secreto impactante sobre sus crímenes. Horatio Caine y el resto del equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine ha decidido proteger a un luchador de artes marciales mixtas de su peligroso hermano que recientemente se escapó de la cárcel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI encuentra a una universitaria muerta en un jacuzzi, investiga un caso marcado por celos, psicosis y compañeros de cuarto de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio Caine persigue a un misterioso sospechoso de asesinato, descubre que toda la vida del hombre es una elaborada farsa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Después de que Horatio captura al último fugitivo de la cárcel, su avión de transporte realiza un aterrizaje forzoso y se descubre que el fugitivo tiene planeado algo más que una fuga.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Las vidas de Horatio y Natalia penden de un hilo mientras Horatio se interpone entre Natalia y una muerte segura.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español: Tieso (S10 Ep2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en el mundo sexy de los gigolós cuando descubren un arma homicida poco común.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un tornado pasa por encima de una escena de un crimen, daña la evidencia y pone a Ryan y Walter en grave peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo persigue a un asesino sádico que les quita los ojos a las mujeres y un nuevo archienemigo desafía a Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio protege a una jefa de la policía mexicana del misterioso asesino que mató a su esposo.

programme.title: About Adam

programme.title: Treintona, soltera y fantástica
programme.desc: Una mujer en sus treinta y tantos años se descubre a sí misma a través de la vida, el amor y el corazón roto.

programme.title: ¿Quieres ser mi hijo?
programme.desc: Una mujer de 40 años le pide a su vecino de 23 años, a quien detesta, que finja ser su hijo, durante un viaje de fin de semana para obtener un trabajo que le ayudará a regresar a la vida que perdió.

programme.title: Bella
programme.desc: Tarde o temprano todos debemos enfrentar un momento clave que cambiará nuestras vidas para siempre. Si aún no te ha pasado... pronto sucederá. "Bella" es una historia de amor verdadero sobre un día en la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Como si fuera cierto
programme.desc: David Abbott, un arquitecto solitario, encuentra un increíble apartamento en San Francisco, solo para descubrir que está embrujado por el espíritu del inquilino anterior, Elizabeth Masterson, una doctora superdotada que está en coma.

programme.title: Prueba de amor
programme.desc: Desde que se conocen en medio del caos de la universidad en Nueva York, Al (Freddie Prinze Jr.) e Imogen (Julia Stiles) comienzan una aventura romántica en la que el amor verdadero a veces compite con la tentación de alejarse del compromiso.

programme.title: Los tuyos, los míos, y los nuestros
programme.desc: Un almirante viudo de la Guardia costera y una viuda diseñadora de bolsos se enamoran y se casan, para la consternación de sus hijos, ocho de él y diez de ella.

programme.title: Chitty Chitty Bang Bang
programme.desc: Dick Van Dyke interpreta a un excéntrico inventor que crea un extraordinario coche que conduce por tierra, mar y aire, y que le lleva con sus hijos y su novia (Sally Ann Howes) a un mundo mágico de aventuras sin fin. ¡Un clásico para la familia!

programme.title: Llega un jinete libre y salvaje
programme.desc: En el Viejo Oeste de los años 40, dos ganaderos de poca monta se alían para hacer frente a los estragos de un terrateniente despiadado que pretende ampliar su imperio a cualquier precio. Protagonizada por Jane Fonda, James Caan y Jason Robards.

programme.title: El Quijote
programme.desc: Don Quijote lucha contra unos rebaños de ovejas pensando que son ejércitos, detiene una oscura procesión pensando que están poseídas y, más tarde, encuentran una cuerda de cautivos a los que Don Quijote libera.

programme.title: El Quijote
programme.desc: Rocinante tiene un romance del que sale golpeado, al igual que su dueño. Don Quijote y Sancho llegan a una venta donde son nuevamente golpeados y Sancho queda mantado por que Don Quijote no quiere pagarle al ventero.

programme.title: El Quijote
programme.desc: Alonso Quijano 'Don Quijote', un noble manchego influido por la lectura de libros de caballerías, decide salir de su casa para deshacer entuertos.

programme.title: Tiempo de morir
programme.desc: Después de cumplir su condena, un ex pistolero regresa a su ciudad planeando vivir una vida tranquila, sin embargo, los hijos de un hombre que mató tienen otros planes.

programme.title: ¡Agáchate, maldito!
programme.desc: Un desenlace explosivo aguarda a un terrorista irlandés (James Coburn) obsesionado con la dinamita, quien se alía con un campesino mexicano convertido en revolucionario (Rod Steiger) en este trepidante relato de poder y política.

programme.title: Tierra de policias
programme.desc: El director de Ford vs. Ferrari junta a un elenco de estrellas que incluye a Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta y Harvey Keitel en este tenso thriller lleno de acción y crimen.

programme.title: Un plan sencillo
programme.desc: Dos hermanos encuentran cuatro millones de dólares en una avioneta caída e intentan quedarse con el dinero, pero la paranoia, la codicia y el miedo a ser capturado hacen que su plan esté fuera de control, con consecuencias desastrosas.

programme.title: Destrucción
programme.desc: Una detective de policía reconecta con gente relacionada con una misión encubierta de hace años para encontrar paz.

programme.title: La acusación de Rachel
programme.desc: Inspirado en una historia real. Una madre protege a su hijastra después de que la adolescente presencie el asesinato de su mejor amiga, pero pronto se ve obligada a enfrentarse a la aterradora posibilidad de que su hijastra sea la verdadera asesina.

programme.title: Sin Rastro
programme.desc: Un hombre busca a su esposa desaparecida luego de que se rompe su coche en una ruta desierta.

programme.title: Caza Terrorista
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage enciende un barril de pólvora de acción mientras un veterano agente de la CIA va a la caza de su némesis, un terrorista mortal.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Legalmente rubia
programme.desc: Una chica hará cualquier cosa para conservar a su hombre. Aunque eso signifique ir… ¡A la Facultad de Derecho! Reese Witherspoon protagoniza con Luke Wilson, Selma Blair y Victor Garber una comedia con corazón de oro, ¡y un cabello que hace juego!

programme.title: Están todos bien
programme.desc: Cuando los hijos de Frank Goode (Robert DeNiro) cancelan una reunión familiar, el viudo emprende un viaje por el país para reconectarse con ellos. Esperando compartir las alegrías de sus vidas felices, sus visitas revelan una imagen no muy perfecta.

programme.title: Un perdedor sin suerte
programme.desc: Ferrell nunca ha estado mejor (Galán) como un vendedor que pierde a su esposa y su trabajo en el mismo día y, ante el colapso de su vida, empieza a vivir en su patio delantero.

programme.title: Sophie's Choice
programme.desc: Adapted from William Styron's best-selling novel, this passionate tale of a writer's love for a holocaust survivor is an exhilarating and compelling revelation.

programme.title: Señales de humo
programme.desc: Esta película, favorita de la crítica y el público, sigue a dos amigos muy diferentes en un viaje que nunca esperaban hacer. Combinando humor y emociones, explora la aventura de la amistad y el descubrimiento de nuevos mundos.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: El pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: Venganza
programme.desc: Durante su permiso de libertad provisional, un convicto logra escapar de los guardias y planea su venganza contra aquellos que lo convirtieron en un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: Asesinatos accidentales
programme.desc: Mike Fallon es un sicario experimentado conocido por hacer que la muerte de sus objetivos parezca un accidente. Cuando su novia aparece muerta, él va tras sus antiguos colegas para encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Yo soy la venganza
programme.desc: Un hombre inicia un camino de venganza contra varios oficiales de policía corruptos, al ser incapaz de descubrir al asesino de su mujer.

programme.title: Doble traición
programme.desc: Una semana antes de Navidad, y después de pasar seis años en prisión, un expresidiario se ve obligado a participar en un atraco al casino.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Lo imposible
programme.desc: Nominada al Oscar (Mejor Actriz, Naomi Watts), este apasionante drama cuenta la increíble historia real de la supervivencia de una familia frente a probabilidades imposibles.

programme.title: Capturen a Quigley
programme.desc: El francotirador Matthew Quigley (Tom Selleck) cree que ha sido contratado para matar perros salvajes en Australia, pero un rico ganadero (Alan Rickman) tiene otros planes para el francotirador. Laura San Giacomo coprotagoniza este elegante western.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Rugrats: Vacaciones salvajes
programme.desc: Las vacaciones de la familia Rugrats toman un desvío exótico cuando su barco se da vuelta y naufragan en una isla tropical desierta.

programme.title: Cazador de cocodrilos
programme.desc: Para salvar a un cocodrilo de un ranchero cuyo ganado estaba siendo depredado, Steve Irwin y su esposa Terri se dispusieron a atraparlo y reubicarlo. ¡Pero el cocodrilo se tragó un faro satelital y los transformó en objetivos de la CIA! ¡Cielos!

programme.title: Capturen a Quigley
programme.desc: El francotirador Matthew Quigley (Tom Selleck) cree que ha sido contratado para matar perros salvajes en Australia, pero un rico ganadero (Alan Rickman) tiene otros planes para el francotirador. Laura San Giacomo coprotagoniza este elegante western.

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: Un pequeño gran problema
programme.desc: Wren es una chica cuyos planes para asistir al evento escolar del año terminan cuando tiene que cuidar de su hermano. Cuando él desaparece, Wren debe salir a buscarlo antes de que su madre descubra que está perdido.

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: Un disparo en la sombra
programme.desc: Al torpe inspector Clouseau (Peter Sellers) se le asigna un importante caso, pero se enamora de la principal sospechosa (Elke Sommer), aumentan los cadáveres y Clouseau debe darse prisa por encontrar al verdadero culpable o su carrera acabará.

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: ¿Quieres ser mi hijo?

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: El robo del siglo
programme.desc: Basada en hechos reales, un grupo de ladrones realizó el que se considera uno de los robos bancarios más famosos e inteligentes de la historia de Argentina al robar la sucursal del Banco Río en Acassuso.

programme.title: Gafas amarillas
programme.desc: Luego de una separación, Julia se muda a un frío departamento donde enfrenta los conflictos cotidianos de la soledad. Julia encuentra un nuevo comienzo cuando tiene una aventura con Darío, un atractivo mesero con ínfulas de poeta.

programme.title: Rojo
programme.desc: Un misterioso hombre llega a una ciudad y sin motivo aparente agrede a Claudio, un exitoso abogado. Tras un intento fallido, los ataques continúan, lo que despierta la ira de la esposa de Claudio.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow

programme.title: Negra Navidad

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: Muerte en la montaña
programme.desc: Un día típico en las laderas se convierte en una escalofriante pesadilla para tres amigos que se disponen a esquiar en la nieve cuando se quedan varados en la telesilla antes de su última bajada.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Picking apples while on a picnic, Oliver runs into the feisty Ira Hatch, the owner of the apple orchard. However, once back in town, Mr. Drucker tells Oliver that Hatch has been dead for years. An incredulous Oliver agrees to see a psychologist.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Someone has stolen $300 from Mr. Drucker's general store, and it looks like Eb is the culprit. How else could he have bought himself a new car that cost, you guessed it, exactly $300? But that is just the first twist of the many turns of this story.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: Gillespie is reunited with his daughter Lana, when she comes to Sparta to settle her inheritance, but she’s been followed by her mother’s ex-boyfriend, who claims that it all belongs to him, and he’s willing to take drastic measures to collect.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.desc: Un perfil de comportamiento hizo que el Departamento de Policía de Baton Rouge buscara al hombre equivocado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Winston is set to play the lead in his musical but is not pleased that Lola could star opposite him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Frankie’s birthday, and she’s going to celebrate it, Hollingsworth style -- with a Gatsby party!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe is facing jail time following the fundraising scandal

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky has feelings for Jonah, but she isn't sure what to do with them.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya has someone on her mind, and is questioning the house rules Mrs. Matlin has set.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig is hesitant to let Maya see his new place.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig learns the truth behind some recent events, and now he’s an accomplice to a crime.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vince has taken Zig in and treated him like family, but his actions have put Zig, and now even Maya, in harm’s way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s prom time at Degrassi and in a last-minute shot to save his night, Drew plans an elaborate prom-posal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew agrees to help Dallas salvage Prom and is punished.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya fails her CPR and now she can’t spend the summer lifeguarding at the beach with Zig.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone’s spooked by Gloria’s disappearance as strange things continue to happen.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Determined to get to the bottom of Mr. Bane’s creepy info trove, Zoe and Grace break into his car only to discover more incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe attempts to ward off her feelings for an unlikely candidate by leaning into a romance a familiar face.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen-year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley has set her sights on becoming Degrassi's School President. Toby, spurred on by their awkward new situation as step-siblings, is frustrated by her unchallenged status and convinces JT to run against her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri's sure that no guy will ever want her and she wants to skip the school dance. Spinner seems interested in her though, and Ashley and Paige convince her to let them make her over.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve travels to new depths as he discovers just what it takes to be an aquatic terror. His quest sees him rocket through water in spectacular style, just like an Opthalmosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve's on a mission to find dinosaurs that have something a little special: fearsome killers, with incredible abilities! Get ready for a sensory sensation! His quest sees him race in the dark like a Troodon.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is on the hunt for the most deadly animals to have ever walked the earth, dinosaurs. Steve goes on a mission to uncover what was deadlier than the dinosaurs, from monsoons and super-sized sandstorms to ballistic bacteria and gory gas.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall looks back at the most awesome experiments over the series and chooses his highlights.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.desc: Dr Michael Scott investigates the secrets of a tomb containing over 2,000 bodies in one of the catacombs of Rome.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: A US law has been passed forcing the return of ethnic artefacts and ancestral remains to native communities.

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a Rottweiler who has suffered a lifetime of abuse adjust to her new life after finally finding a loving home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A terrier rescued via the Internet is a handful to manage and bites anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters; pit bull problems.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A family's German shepherd will only listen to one person; a Brittany spaniel becomes aggressive around female dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A family deals with a stray dog who bites; Daisy Fuentes has trouble controlling her English bulldog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog barks all the time and might pose a threat to children; a beagle mix has lots of strange behaviors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes the the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar joins forces with Jennifer McCarthy to examine the nature of wolf-dogs, the result of the cross-breeding of wolves and domestic dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A herding dog likes to bite the noses of horses; a family struggles with a dog who runs out the door as soon as it is opened.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Lucy, an odd dalmatian who is affectionate one minute and angry the next and Lizzie who is obsessed with running all the time.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar has his hands full with a Labrador that is obsessed with water and a Chihuahua with a penchant for biting legs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close-knit community.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam, and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address, they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To the dismay of the Keaton children and their equally conservative grandparents, Steven and Elyse take time out Thanksgiving Day to attend an anti-nuke rally-and end up spending the holiday in jail.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Though Alex loves working at Mr. Adler's "Mom and Pop" grocery store, to the old man's dismay, he quits to "climb the corporate ladder" at an ultramodern supermarket.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The Keatons consider buying a gun for protection after getting burglarized.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory resents Elyse for the advice she gives her pregnant friend.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When popular sorority girl Sherry Marshall befriends Mallory to get close to Alex, Mallory brings them together in hopes of joining Pi Nu but her plan backfires.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As Big Brother to a 10-year-old Vietnamese boy, Alex tries to mold Ming into his own image, and he learns an unforgettable lesson when he breaks a promise to the adoring child.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex gets stuck babysitting for his little sister Jennifer, who is fed up with feeling in the way at his poker game and decides to disappear.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When pretty Carrie Newman and her mother Julia come to visit the Keatons, Carrie's forward behavior sends Alex into a panic.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.desc: On his 18th birthday, Alex defies his mother and goes off with some of his buddies to celebrate at an out-of-town nightclub.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan tries to convince a powerful senator to restore severe budget cuts dealing with health care. However, the assignment seems doomed when the senator suffers a fatal heart attack.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark plans to give a recent windfall to a boys' club. But first, he must deal with some con artists.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's assignment at Christmastime is to show a disillusioned columnist that there's still some good out there.

programme.desc: Monica must convince a successful young attorney to give up an obsessive love for the man who ruined her life

programme.desc: The angels intervene when the lifelong rivalry between two sibling skiers (guest stars David Lascher and Sean Murray) culminates in tragedy. With Roma Downey and Della Reese.

programme.desc: The angels help a young girl with dreams of becoming an Olympic ice skater overcome her criminal past

programme.desc: The approach of Christmas finds Dr. Mike and Sully far from home, while Daniel ponders an offer to leave Colorado Springs.

programme.desc: Dr. Mike is shot point blank by a man with a grudge against doctors.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen finds herself the subject of a fatal attraction.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike is sworn to secrecy when she learns that Loren plans to move away for good.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark pose as priests in order to re-open an abandoned church as a shelter when a major fire breaks out in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Wally is a hobo and street puppeteer whose caring and goodness have made him an angel without him knowing it.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A struggling pianist tries to start life again after a heart attack.

programme.title: The Raid 2 (Subtitled)
programme.desc: Following immediately after the events of THE RAID, Rama (Iko Uwais) is forced to reinvent himself as an undercover cop in order to provide protection for his wife and child.

programme.title: Preman: Silent Fury
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a brutal murder by a notorious crime boss, a deaf Indonesian gangster is thrust into the fight of his life when he takes on his dangerous former allies—including a sociopathic assassin—in order to protect his child.

programme.title: Bad City
programme.desc: In poverty-stricken Kaiko City, a corrupt mayoral candidate eliminates rival mafias, prompting a released ex-cop to lead a treacherous battle for justice with a special task force in the gritty underworld.

programme.title: One-Percent Warrior
programme.desc: After his devastatingly fast, samurai-style combat approach sets filmmakers against him, a legendary action star (Tak Sakaguchi) films his own movie—on turf claimed by feuding yakuza gangs, including Japan’s deadliest martial arts assassin.

programme.title: Badges of Fury
programme.desc: In just 3 days, three cases of Smiling Murder shock Hong Kong. The young detective Wang Bu'er and his buddy Huang Feihong embark on an investigation full of excitement and unexpected events.

programme.title: The Legend
programme.desc: This Hong Kong martial-arts extravaganza tells of evil emperors and true love. The secret Red Lotus Flower Society is committed to the overthrow of the evil Manchu Emperor and his minions.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: The Cantonese hero Fong Sai Yuk becomes involved in the secret brotherhood "The Red Flower", who are trying to overthrow the Manchurian emperor and re-establishing the Ming dynasty.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En febrero de 1988, un vendedor de una disquera en Sandusky, Ohio, recibió un disparo mortal en su camioneta. Después de descubrir un bolso con miles de dólares dentro del vehículo, la policía supo que el robo no era el motivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En junio de 1973, una niña fue secuestrada de un parque estatal en el río Misuri mientras acampaba con su familia. Pasaron varios meses sin tener pistas, pero luego un agente del FBI tomó un interés particular en el caso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1996, un grupo de políticos extremistas robaron dos veces un banco en Spokane, Washington, con el uso de bombas caseras y la precisión militar para escapar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En agosto de 1992, un hombre regresó a su casa en Memphis y descubrió que su esposa estaba desaparecida. El esposo, así como sus amigos, sus familiares y vecinos, empezaron a recibir llamadas al azar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1990 y 1991, la policía de Chicago y el FBI estaban tras el rastro de un ladrón de bancos cuyos asaltos se estaban tornando cada vez más violentos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1988, surgieron nuevas pistas sobre la muerte misteriosa de un granjero de Carolina del Sur cuando un criminal confesó que dos miembros prominentes de la comunidad lo habían contratado para cometer un asesinato.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1993, un ladrón sorprendió a clientes desprevenidos al descender por el techo de un banco de California. Cuando la policía llegó, escapó por el mismo lugar en medio de una balacera.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En enero de 1984, un oficial de aduanas desaparece de su puesto cerca de del río en el cruce de la frontera con Texas, incitando a la policía local a buscar a cuatro sospechosos latinoamericano. Al día siguiente, el oficial de aduanas fue hallado muerto.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Entre las guerras de cocaína en Miami a principios de 1980, tres cadáveres llevaron a un escuadrón táctico formado por varias agencias a sospechar que un grupo de policías podía estar involucrado en redadas ilegales por drogas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A las nueve y treinta de la mañana del 30 de enero de 1997, la policía de Richmond, Virginia, respondió a un reporte de disparos en un banco local.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un hombre es encontrado sofocado en su casa de Pennsylvania, y su chequera, tarjetas de crédito y su vehículo parecían haber sido robados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Wisconsin, un atleta universitario fue vendado de los ojos, amordazado y arrojado dentro de una camioneta por un hombre armado.

programme.desc: When the punks in the Hooligang cruise into Quiet Lawn Cavern, they think no one there’s got the guts to stand up to them so they trash the place.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The gang signs up for a weekend camp that promises to teach your slugs tons of new moves — without lifting a finger!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Slug Run is the ultimate, off-road, no-holds-barred, cross-cavern Mecha Beast race.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When even Kord can’t find a way to fix what’s wrong with the new upgrades to the Shane Gang’s Mecha Beasts, it’s time to go to the source: the wondrous Mecha Forge!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli doesn’t believe in ghosts — until he enters Deadweed cavern! But it turns out Eli’s first instinct was right.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A short cut takes the Shane Gang through the territory of the Shadow Clan — and try as they might not to, they are discovered and captured by the mysterious creatures.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Pronto is thrown in jail on trumped-up charges by a corrupt judge, and the only chance to break him out is Eli making a one-in-a-million trick shot.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: Kara is double-crossed by Brackus and must find a way home from the Dark Realm by herself.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: After the Defenders discover that Doku and a group of warlords is planning to take control of Rados, Seth gets wounded as a result of Rion jumping in to an attack.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: When the Defenders learn of the black market Guardian dealer Sii, they pose as interested customers.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: When a mining village is terrorized by Kid Cole, Erik and Rion respond to the call for help while Seth and Mel go in search of Malco and Flinch.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: Erik, Rion and Brackus head to the island of Rivas to meet up with Seth and Mel and help find Brim the stone cutter.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: Mel has a vision of the temple of Yan-Sumos, an ancient battleground where the Wizards of Yan fought the Ethos.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fury
programme.desc: Rago destroys the temple in Mexico with Diablo Nemesis and disappears. Gingka and his crew return to WBBA Headquarters to find a way to find and defeat Diablo Nemesis.

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fury
programme.desc: Gingka and his friends locate Rago and Nemesis in the Pacific Ocean, but when they try to get to them, they find their way blocked to Johannes and his cronies.

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fury
programme.desc: Gingka and his friends fly through a storm to get to the Lost Kingdom of Hades. Meanwhile, Ryuga and L-Drago battle Rago and Nemesis, and Ryuga loses

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fury
programme.desc: Pluto and Rago move forward with their plan to destroy the world, as Gingka and his friends battle with everything they've got to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fury
programme.desc: Gingka realizes that Kenta has taken Ryuga's place as a summer constellation Legendary Blader. Kenta joins Gingka and the others as they attempt to defeat Rago and Nemesis.

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fury
programme.desc: Gingka and his friends think that they have defeated Nemesis, but it returns, and it appears that the end is near until all the bladers give their power to Gingka and Pegasus and the battle begins again.

programme.title: Bakugan Gundalian Invaders
programme.desc: The final battle for possession of the Sacred Orb is underway.

programme.title: Bakugan Gundalian Invaders
programme.desc: The Sacred Orb transports Dan, Drago, Barodius, and Dharak to a middle dimension.

programme.title: Bakugan Mechtanium Surge
programme.desc: The Brawlers have returned to Earth and are battling inside the expanded, awesome new Bakugan Interspace.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all ... in the form of the T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen scrambles to shut down O.O.P.S.I. before it can do real damage, while Claire and the others hunt the escaped twin dinosaurs ... only to become hunted themselves!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Fugitives From Madness
programme.desc: Zane, Bonzle and Cole meet their creator Gandalaria. Kai is appointed the third Dragon Master. The dragon masters turn into stone sculptures as the blood moon appears in the sky. The other ninja's training ends prematurely.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Secrets of the Wyldness
programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Forest of Spirits
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Gandalaria search for a release spell and obtain magical powers. The ninjas rush to the Ritual of the Blood Moon to stop Lord Ras. Kai and Sora disguise themselves as Wolf Mask Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor declares himself to be the destined leader who will reawaken The Great Devourer – an ancient beast who can’t be killed and will consume all of Ninjago. We find out Nya is the Samurai and Lloyd is taken prisoner by the snake tribes.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have to cut their first date in Mega-Monster Amusement Park short as the Serpentine are on their way to retrieve the first or four fang blades to be used to awaken the Great Devourer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines’ inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd’s rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Laval and Cragger attempt to get all the tribes to agree on a lasting peace in Chima, but Crooler creates a strange fog that makes everyone very powerful and angry, especially Cragger.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Laval’s actions to break up the fighting at the peace talks force Lion King Lagravis to exile his son. Laval learns that Cragger has imprisoned his father in his absence. He must free him, but how can he do that when has been exiled?

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: A strange black cloud has appeared around the floating Mt. Cavora, the source of the Chi. Laval and Eris investigate, but the cloud seems to fight back. The tribes of Chima will be all join in the fight against the black cloud. The worst is yet to come.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When the Murky Realm disappears, a student's intense daydream results in dangerous sirens and the dream chasers must keep hapless students and teachers safe as Mateo faces pressure to meet his dad's new girlfriend.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Harl attempts to prevent Tippy from bringing the fabled "Mars Door" back to Earth. Tippy Dorman, faces the trial of the century after his attempt to take over the world.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.
